description_long: This jewelry piece is a stylized representation of a feline head, likely a panther or leopard, crafted in a metallic gold material with a highly polished, reflective surface. The head features prominent, angular ears and a geometric, faceted structure, giving it a modern and bold appearance. The eyes are set with vivid green elements, possibly gemstones or colored glass, which stand out against the gold. The surface is adorned with a series of cut-out or engraved black spots, enhancing the animal motif and adding visual depth. The overall form is compact and symmetrical, with a smooth underside and no visible attachment points, suggesting it is a pendant or charm. The craftsmanship and design indicate a statement piece, suitable for urban fashion contexts.
description: A gold, geometric feline head pendant with green gemstone eyes and black spot detailing, featuring a polished, reflective finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full feline face, green eyes, and symmetrical black spot pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular ear, faceted cheek, and the depth of the green eye.
description_view_2: Top view reveals the symmetrical ear placement and the distribution of black spots across the head.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the other green eye and the faceted structure.
